name: Spam Broccoli Pecan Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat (12 oz), cut into strips
3/4 lb Broccoli, broken into flowerets, blanched
1/4 lb Cheddar cheese, cut into matchstick-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté SPAM over medium heat until lightly browned.
2. In a large bowl, combine broccoli, SPAM, cheese, and radishes.
3. In a small bowl, combine white wine vinegar, olive oil, sugar, minced garlic, and dry mustard.
4. Toss the dressing with the SPAM mixture.
5. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
6. Before serving, stir in toasted pecans.
